items.description: This project enhances CLV prediction (BG-NBD, Gamma-Gamma, clustering, stacking) with causal inference. It applies ATE, CATE, DML, Causal Forests, along with naive & partial correlations, using a DAG framework and handling collider bias, to uncover true drivers of customer value for better decision-making.
